glosses.vi: nữ bác sĩ; bác sĩ nữ

sentences.target: Ich habe morgen einen Termin bei der Ärztin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈɛʁt͡stɪn/

translations.de: Ich habe morgen einen Termin bei der Ärztin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈɛʁt͡stɪn/
translations.en: I have an appointment at the doctor’s tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana tengo cita con la doctora.
translations.fr: J’ai rendez-vous chez la docteure demain.
translations.it: Domani ho un appuntamento dalla dottoressa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天有个看医生的预约。
translations.yue: 我聽日有個睇醫生嘅預約。
translations.ru: Завтра у меня запись к врачу.
translations.pt: Amanhã tenho consulta com a médica.
translations.he: מחר יש לי תור אצל הרופאה.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi có lịch hẹn với bác sĩ.
translations.nl: Morgen heb ik een afspraak bij de dokter.
translations.uk: Завтра в мене запис до лікарки.
translations.hi: कल मेरे डॉक्टर के पास अपॉइंटमेंट है।
translations.el: Αύριο έχω ραντεβού με τη γιατρό.
translations.nb: Jeg har time hos legen i morgen.
translations.id: Besok saya ada janji dengan dokter.
translations.sv: Jag har en tid hos läkaren i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg har en tid hos lægen i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、病院の予約があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); governs an accusative object ('einen Termin') and a prepositional phrase ('bei der Ärztin').
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Indefinite article; masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Termin'.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition selecting dative; heads the PP 'bei der Ärztin' indicating location/association.
Definite article; feminine dative singular (required by 'bei'); determiner of 'Ärztin'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'bei'.

translations.en: My doctor will call back soon.
translations.es: Mi doctora me devolverá la llamada en breve.
translations.it: La mia dottoressa richiamerà tra poco.
translations.ko: 의사 선생님이 곧 전화 주실 거예요.
translations.yue: 醫生一陣間會覆我電話。
translations.pt: Minha médica vai retornar a ligação em breve.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ của tôi sẽ gọi lại sớm.
translations.hi: मेरी डॉक्टर जल्द ही वापस कॉल करेंगी।
translations.el: Η γιατρός μου θα με καλέσει σύντομα.
translations.id: Dokter saya akan segera menelepon balik.
translations.ro: Doctorița mea va suna înapoi în curând.
translations.ja: 医者がすぐ折り返し電話してくれます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Ärztin' (subject).
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); verb-second position; part of the separable verb 'zurückrufen' with particle 'zurück'.
Temporal/manner adverb meaning 'soon/right away'; modifies the verb phrase.
Separable verbal particle; forms 'zurückrufen' ('to call back') together with 'ruft'; placed clause-final in main clause.

translations.en: A young doctor lives next door.
translations.es: Al lado vive una doctora joven.
translations.fr: Une jeune docteure habite à côté.
translations.ko: 옆집에 젊은 의사 한 분이 살아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 隔壁住着一位年轻的医生。
translations.yue: 隔離住咗位後生女醫生。
translations.pt: Uma médica jovem mora ao lado.
translations.tr: Yan dairede genç bir doktor yaşıyor.
translations.vi: Một bác sĩ trẻ sống ngay bên cạnh.
translations.ar: تسكن طبيبة شابة في الشقة المجاورة.
translations.hu: A szomszédban egy fiatal doktornő lakik.
translations.hi: बगल में एक युवा डॉक्टर रहती हैं।
translations.nb: En ung lege bor ved siden av.
translations.id: Seorang dokter muda tinggal di sebelah.
translations.da: En ung læge bor ved siden af.
translations.ja: 隣に若い医者が住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb setting the scene; sentence-initial frame that triggers verb-second placement.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); occupies V2 position.
Indefinite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Ärztin' (post-verbal subject).
Attributive adjective; feminine nominative singular (ending -e); modifies 'Ärztin'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject following the verb due to V2 word order.

sentences.target: Die Ärztin hört meine Lunge ab.

translations.de: Die Ärztin hört meine Lunge ab.
translations.en: The doctor listens to my lungs.
translations.es: La doctora me escucha los pulmones.
translations.it: La dottoressa mi ascolta i polmoni.
translations.ko: 의사 선생님이 제 폐 소리를 듣고 있어요.
translations.pt: A médica está ouvindo meus pulmões.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ đang nghe phổi của tôi.
translations.nl: De arts luistert naar mijn longen.
translations.hi: मेरी डॉक्टर मेरे फेफड़ों को सुन रही हैं।
translations.el: Η γιατρός ακούει τους πνεύμονές μου.
translations.ja: 医者が私の肺の音を聴いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Ärztin'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); part of the separable verb 'abhören' with clause-final particle 'ab' (medical: to auscultate).
Possessive determiner; feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Lunge' (direct object).
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'hört ... ab'.
Separable verbal particle; forms 'abhören' with 'hört'; placed clause-final in main clause.
